title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIII. Jingles.
content:
Tiddle liddle lightum,
            Pitch and tar;
        Tiddle liddle lightum,
            What's that for?
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXIII. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
